Engadget reports that AI operators are increasingly judged on how quickly they can unwind a problematic rollout without breaking downstream workflows.

Watch: Demo of the latest AI gadget

Infrastructure teams are being asked to show evidence of circuit breakers, audit logs, and clear human escalation before new models move into production.

Listen to this article

That pressure is making reliability engineering and product operations much more central to AI deployment reviews than a year ago.

Recommended by Engadget
